column1: # Ingester filter configuration. One setting per line: KEY<TAB>VALUE.
# Lines beginning with # are comments. All settings are optional.
# Priority: CLI flag > config file setting > hardcoded default.
# Binary stream-offset cache (skips ~25s bz2 index decode on start/restart).
# Build/refresh eagerly with: npm run build-offset-cache -- <index.txt.bz2>
# Sampling: process every Nth stream for even alphabetical coverage (default: 1 = all streams).
# If stop_after_collecting is set and not reached after a full pass, halve stride and retry
# up to max_restarts times, incrementing start by 1 each time to fill gaps between passes.
# Limits: stop early after N considered or N collected entries
# Category exclusions (repeatable): skip all entries in a category
# Date range (inclusive, in years CE; negative = BCE)
# Reject entries with no extractable coordinates (map-focused dataset).
# Per-infobox-type birth-year cap: reject if the entry's start year (birth date
# for person/officeholder infoboxes) exceeds the cap. Format: <type><TAB><year>.
